name: rewindai
description: Version-controlled AI memory tied to git commits. Context auto-saves on commit, auto-restores on checkout.

chatParticipants.name: rewind
chatParticipants.description: AI coding assistant with version-controlled memory tied to git commits

commands.name: history
commands.description: Show commits with saved AI context

rewindai.provider.description: Which LLM API to use. Anthropic = Claude, OpenAI = GPT.

rewindai.apiKey.description: Your API key for the selected provider. Get it from console.anthropic.com or platform.openai.com.

rewindai.model.description: Model ID to use. Examples: claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-opus-4-6, gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini

rewindai.backendUrl.description: RewindAI backend URL for Neo4j context indexing (optional — works without backend)
